# orm-objects-set-data-at-path

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the setDataAtPath mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.setDataAtPath({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run setDataAtPath

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.setDataAtPath({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
